prompt: Extrait le texte de a_trier/agents/architecture-agentique.png et donne-moi aussi un résumé de ce que montre ce schéma.
assertions: Output file exists with the same base name as the source image and a .txt extension
Output contains the verbatim transcribed text from the diagram (titles, bullet points, and diagram labels)
Output contains a distinct 'Summary' section describing the diagram, clearly separated from the verbatim transcription
The summary is a brief description (a few sentences) of what the diagram shows, not a restatement of the transcribed text
